csatTickets.comment:
It took over a week and me sending a second email, this one devoid of any pictures showing the condition of my Xero shoes, before I got any response. Those came quickly, but they did not make me feel acknowledged as a human, and the consolation coming instead from an AI agent made it feel superficial and like there was no caring. Steven said this to me in October of 2024: "I think it's important that you know there are real people behind all our electronic communication and our screens and our devices.

People who care. People working hard to make a difference. 

People you can reach out to if you need help. People, like you, who don't get it right every time, but will always do the best they can." What happened to those values?
